_comment: PORT_STRIKE — Hamburg, HIGH severity. Drives WAIT risk boost + second approval flag.
description: Hamburg port workers union confirmed a 48-hour warning strike starting 2026-05-27, affecting container and bulk cargo terminals.
decision_relevance: The original shipment is due to berth at Hamburg during the strike window. Waiting exposes production to the full delay plus potential docking refusal. Rerouting or replacement may avoid this window entirely.

_comment: MARITIME_SECURITY_WARNING — Bay of Biscay, HIGH severity. Flags second approval.
route: Bay of Biscay — North Atlantic approach
description: Severe weather warning (Beaufort 9–10, 5–6m swell) active across Bay of Biscay. Several vessels diverted to Bilbao anchorage.
decision_relevance: MSC Barcelona is currently transiting this route. Severe conditions may cause a further 1–2 day deviation beyond the model prediction. Second approval recommended given the combined cost exposure.

_comment: GEOPOLITICAL_RISK — North Sea, MEDIUM severity. Informational only.
description: Ongoing EU–UK customs friction causing intermittent inspection delays at Dover Strait. Average additional dwell: 4–6 hours.
decision_relevance: Low direct impact for Hamburg-bound cargo. Informational — no scoring change warranted at current severity.
